questions.q: Which messaging app warned in May 2026 that it would pull out of Canada entirely if made to comply with a new lawful access bill?
Which U.S. state recently faced backlash for approving a datacenter twice the size of Manhattan?
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy stated that Russia's massive 800-drone barrage in May 2026 was deliberately timed to coincide with what event?
options: The signing of the Ukraine-UAE Drone Deal

questions.q: Which Chinese university led the development of the 'Jiuzhang 4.0' quantum computing prototype, which reportedly set a new world record on May 14, 2026? [2.1.5]
options: University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)
questions.correctText: University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)

questions.q: Which country's energy minister announced on May 14, 2026, that the nation has completely run out of diesel and fuel oil amid a U.S. blockade?
Why did an Alberta judge quash a petition calling for a referendum on the province's separation in May 2026?
options: The provincial government failed in its duty to consult with First Nations
The petition did not gather the required 500,000 signatures
The proposed referendum question was overly vague
Separation violates the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms
questions.correctText: The provincial government failed in its duty to consult with First Nations

questions.q: On May 14, 2026, which Japanese telecom corporation announced a new technology to stabilize video quality for remote drone operations using Local 5G?
In May 2026, the Russian parliament passed a bill explicitly allowing President Vladimir Putin to do what?
options: Deploy troops extraterritorially to protect Russian citizens abroad
Annex the Transcarpathia region of Ukraine
Launch preemptive nuclear strikes against NATO
Blockade European shipments in the Black Sea
questions.correctText: Deploy troops extraterritorially to protect Russian citizens abroad

questions.q: In May 2026, sources revealed Prime Minister Mark Carney was set to announce a long-delayed national strategy regarding what sector?
Which country announced it has run out of diesel and fuel oil amid a U.S. oil blockade in May 2026?
